ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "project_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "project_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the repository belongs to */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "repository_type" TEXT /* Type of the repository (e.g., github, gitlab, bitbucket) */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit to the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., execution time, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was collected */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, bytes) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "threshold_operator" TEXT /* Operator for the threshold (e.g., >, <, =) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file in the repository */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the file was last modified */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., java, clojure, xml) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_metrics" (
  "file_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file metric */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., execution time, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was collected */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, bytes) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "threshold_operator" TEXT /* Operator for the threshold (e.g., >, <, =) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_metrics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the threshold belongs to */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "threshold_operator" TEXT /* Operator for the threshold (e.g., >, <, =) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threshold the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, developer, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)
